source: PM handover conversation + founder scope reset

attachment_creation_rate.description: Percentage of active users who add at least one yacht attachment
attachment_creation_rate.target: High enough to form a usable colleague graph
attachment_creation_rate.action_if_breached: Review onboarding, yacht creation UX, and attachment friction

users_with_valid_attachment.description: Percentage of active users with at least one usable yacht attachment
users_with_valid_attachment.action_if_breached: Pause adjacent feature work and focus on graph formation

endorsement_request_send_rate.description: Percentage of active users who send at least one endorsement request
endorsement_request_send_rate.target: Proves users understand the graph loop
endorsement_request_send_rate.action_if_breached: Improve colleague discovery and request prompts

endorsement_request_completion_rate.description: Percentage of endorsement requests that become completed endorsements
endorsement_request_completion_rate.action_if_breached: Review request UX, notification strategy, and trust friction

endorsement_to_profile_ratio.description: Ratio of users who have given or received an endorsement
endorsement_to_profile_ratio.action_if_breached: Pause growth, diagnose graph formation failure

organic_share_rate.description: Percentage of active users sharing their profile or PDF unprompted per month
organic_share_rate.action_if_breached: Pause growth, investigate standalone value proposition

repeat_flag_rate.description: Percentage of endorsements being flagged or disputed
repeat_flag_rate.action_if_breached: Investigate coercion, gaming, or UX issues

time_to_first_endorsement.description: Median days from signup to first endorsement given or received

false_attachment_dispute_rate.description: Percentage of attachments that trigger dispute or rejection signals
false_attachment_dispute_rate.action_if_breached: Tighten attachment controls and audit yacht quality

pause_mechanism.description: Single config flag to switch from public signup to invite-only
pause_mechanism.emergency_protocol: PM can pause first, explain after if Ari unavailable

ui_visibility.rule: Retractions are never visible in UI
ui_visibility.rationale: Prevents scarlet letter effect, preserves ambiguity

backend_effects: Retraction frequency affects endorser's future signal weight
Feeds into later trust calculations as soft negative
Triggers internal review if patterns cluster around a single person

tiers.name: monitor
tiers.action: Flag internally, watch for patterns, no intervention

tiers.name: shadow_constrain
tiers.trigger: Second independent signal pointing to the same person or yacht
tiers.action: Rate-limit endorsement requests, no notification to user

tiers.name: freeze
tiers.trigger: Three or more independent reports, or concrete evidence
tiers.action: Freeze account endorsement activity, escalate to Ari

allowed_under_pressure: Additional presentation features in Crew Pro
forbidden: Payment affecting endorsement visibility, ordering, or weight
Payment granting moderation or verification power
Yacht payments before crew monetisation stabilises
Priority dispute resolution for paying users
Any feature interpretable as pay to look more trustworthy

forbidden_features: Any UI that labels absence of endorsements as negative
Contextual benchmarking that feels like scoring
resignation_triggers: Payment influencing endorsement visibility, weight, or eligibility
Any move that makes canonical monetisation rule a lie
